global_description: A medium-sized seabird with a distinctive black and white plumage. It has a rounded body, short neck, and a large, colorful beak. The face is white with a black cap and a small, horn-like projection above each eye. The wings and back are black, while the underparts are white. The legs and feet are bright orange.

part_details.beak: Large, triangular, colorful with orange and yellow hues
part_details.face: White with a black cap and small horn-like projections

spatial_relations: The colorful beak is positioned at the front of the face
The black cap covers the top of the head
The horn-like projections are above the eyes
The wings are attached to the sides of the body
The legs extend from the lower body
